hindi: जय गिरिराज गोवर्धन महान। कृष्ण ने उठाया एक हाथ समान॥
english: Victory to Giriraj Govardhan the great; Krishna lifted him with one hand equal in all
roman: Jai Giriraj Govardhan Mahan, Krishna Ne Uthaya Ek Haath Samaan

hindi: गोकुल की रक्षा हेतु। गोवर्धन उठाए प्रभु सेतु॥
english: For the protection of Gokul; the Lord lifted Govardhan as a bridge
roman: Gokul Ki Raksha Hetu, Govardhan Uthaye Prabhu Setu

hindi: सात दिन धारण किया पर्वत। भक्तन की रक्षा अभिनव॥
english: For seven days he held the mountain; protecting devotees in a novel way
roman: Saat Din Dharan Kiya Parvat, Bhaktan Ki Raksha Abhinav

hindi: गिरिराज परिक्रमा पावन। पाप सब धुलते मन भावन॥
english: The circumambulation of Giriraj is sacred; all sins are washed away, pleasing the mind
roman: Giriraj Parikrama Pawan, Pap Sab Dhulte Man Bhavan

hindi: मथुरा वृंदावन के बीच। गिरिराज का पावन धाम नीच॥
english: Between Mathura and Vrindavan; the sacred abode of Giriraj stands humbly
roman: Mathura Vrindavan Ke Beech, Giriraj Ka Pavan Dhaam Neech

hindi: गिरिराज चालीसा जो पढ़े। ब्रज दर्शन का पुण्य बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Giriraj Chalisa; the merit of Braj darshan grows
roman: Giriraj Chalisa Jo Padhe, Braj Darshan Ka Punya Badhe

hindi: जय जय गिरिराज गोवर्धन। कृष्ण के कर पर है आभरण॥
english: Victory to Giriraj Govardhan; you are the ornament on Krishna's hand
roman: Jai Jai Giriraj Govardhan, Krishna Ke Kar Par Hai Abharana
